dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7663 IH: Restoring Washington's Birthday Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Ogles introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To amend section 6103 of title 5, United States Code, to change the date designated for Washington’s Birthday and designate Lincoln’s Birthday as a legal public holiday.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Restoring Washington's Birthday Act of 2026.
Section 6103(a) of title 5, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: by inserting after the item relating to the Birthday of Martin Luther King, Jr., the following:
in the item relating to Washington’s Birthday, by striking the third Monday in February and inserting February 22.
